name: Mercuna
short_description: Navigation middleware for games — pathfinding and movement AI for any genre
about: Mercuna is an Edinburgh-based middleware company specialising in navigation solutions for game developers. Their technology provides robust pathfinding and movement AI for characters and objects in 2D, 3D, and flying environments, used across a wide range of game genres and engines.

news.title: Mercuna: 3D Navigation Middleware for Game Developers
